mapper.select: SELECT id, departure_airport_code, arrival_airport_code, departure_airport_name, arrival_airport_name FROM route
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO route (departure_airport_code, arrival_airport_code, departure_airport_name, arrival_airport_name) VALUES (#{departureAirportCode}, #{arrivalAirportCode}, #{departureAirportName}, #{arrivalAirportName})
